name: Topig (Lenten Chick Pea Kofta)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the chick peas and mix them with cold water until well combined.
2. Add salt and freshly ground white pepper to taste.
3. Mix in the boiled potatoes until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
4. Form the mixture into desired shapes or patties.
5. Allow the kofta to rest for at least 30 minutes before serving.
